what: People seeking affordable or open-source alternatives to paid tools like CapCut, Substance3DDesigner, Eagle app, Photoshop, etc., for video editing, material authoring, visual inspiration collection.
why_us: High engagement on alternatives posts indicates strong demand for cheaper/free/local options in creative tools space. RHR could identify gaps for new micro-SaaS.

what: Indie founder crossed $11k total revenue / $2.8k MRR with organic growth for SaaS launched 8 months ago.
why_us: Shows viability of consistent building without ads; benchmark for RHR users or potential ideas.

what: Open-source alternatives and AI-powered tools like MaterialMaker, personal AI note-taking, agents for building SaaS.
why_us: Trend towards local/AI wrappers replacing expensive SaaS; opportunities for RHR in AI automation.

what: Telegram bots for trading, reminders, community management with engagement.
why_us: Easy monetization potential via bots; people building and using them for specific pains.

what: SaaS founders struggling with sales, validation, client acquisition; pain points in marketing and PMF.
why_us: Recurring complaints on Reddit/elsewhere; RHR can target tools for indie hackers.
